text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Heyo, Big Bro! Break's over and Curren Chan is
comin' at ya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Heyo, Big Sis! Break's over and Curren Chan is
comin' at ya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Did you miss me? If so, you should know...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I missed you too! Let's have a bunch of fun today,
'kay? ♪
